See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 511 => 'Lima/Callao', 5141 => 'Amazonas', 5142 => 'San Martín', 5143 => 'Ancash', 5144 => 'La Libertad', 5151 => 'Puno', 5152 => 'Tacna', 5153 => 'Moquegua', 5154 => 'Arequipa', 5156 => 'Ica', 5161 => 'Ucayali', 5162 => 'Huánuco', 5163 => 'Pasco', 5164 => 'Junín', 5165 => 'Loreto', 5166 => 'Ayacucho', 5167 => 'Huancavelica', 5168 => 'Lima', 5172 => 'Tumbes', 5173 => 'Piura', 5174 => 'Lambayeque', 5175 => 'Lima', 5176 => 'Cajamarca', 5182 => 'Madre de Dios', 5183 => 'Apurímac', 5184 => 'Cusco', ];
